{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114110F85B63A3DB864ED93454"}"},"total":3362},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7259943477340406584","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"吹爆啊！！好看好看好看好看好看[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]！！！虽然是无cp型文，但是那个薄情不错不错，有点男主资质啊哈哈别在意，大大加油！快速更新！！[爱慕]（看小说小时不多，上班听书的，上隐[偷笑]）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690337389,"group_id":"7229209420364778554","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxoAobumc9MhA6kTmXIo3rYsz5cENZiX3kw6TJZHb0ke","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0117b56bdd4641b2ad44f1fd9c406dae~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537053&x-signature=iZ2tqwoyV%2Fxzw3O4hu6aYSF9emQ%3D","user_id":"2867134664283870","user_name":"公子嘎嘎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2867134664283870","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1665465207,"is_worn":false,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229209420364778554","book_info":{"abstract":"【无cp+无敌+苟】唐诗穿越异世修仙界，根骨不佳，卷也卷不赢，摆也摆不烂，累了毁灭吧，运气好的话明天就亖了捏。
“叮~绑定养老系统，每多活一天，系统返给宿主一定修为。”
唐诗:“我突然觉得我还能再苟活亿天！”
——
落柳峰时隔多年，迎来了第二位真传弟子，小弟子眨巴着眼看着眼前的师姐。
师姐人美，就是行为举止太奇怪了。
“怎么了少年？你也到了怀疑自己不是主角的时候吗，放轻松点，大道就在脚下，若一去不回，那便……不去了，修仙不就修的个长生嘛，一去不回还去个球，修个仙把命修没了，划不来，根本划不来。”
“天大地大，小命最大，凡事没有九成八的把握，这和送死有什么区别？”
“三年前我神功未成，我一直隐忍了三年，这三年来他们一直把我当做废物，如今三年之期已到……我居然还是个废物。师弟，生而为人，我很抱歉，所以我决定，这次大比你代表本峰去参加。”
还是奶团子的小师弟宋辞:“……”
这个师姐明明超强却过分的苟。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b0154711ccc1d464c4957f206a396153","author":"烈焰城的祗园","author_id":"","book_id":"7229209420364778554","book_name":"不断苟苟苟的我，无敌很正常吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#602018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7229962122137076263","read_count":"16048","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1066414"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"514","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,系统,穿越,无敌,无CP,今穿古,异世穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/836716ace743a69879d9d9cb3ffd23a9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162070&x-signature=nFLTGwj6V4lbgi1IPZjKWXru3s0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2787959280264654","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt": "1.0777967e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114110F85B63A3DB864ED93454"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":60,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10777,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":24015},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7357944669459497752","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主无CP并且无敌，我在番茄第一本全部看完没有看一半放弃的小说。虽然女主招式不多，但胜在无敌，看得人直呼过瘾。
很多小人物都塑造得很好，有的感人有的唏嘘，虽然作者感觉有些地方没有交代清楚，比如云衍宗啊太虚烛龙啊姬氏最后的结局啊什么的，但并不妨碍整体观看。
这本书的文笔也不错，虽然很多大场面的描写感觉很重复，但是不妨碍作者成功给我们写出了那种震撼感，让人心潮澎拜。全书感觉出现最多的词语就是‘血雾’和‘虚空’，有些决战前面的故事会有点啰嗦，忍不住让人想跳过去直接看女主开大，可是不妨碍写的都很细致，可能想多些字数？
最后想说我是个看小说耐心不多的人，所以很多小说看一半就失去了兴趣，可是这本我几天内就全看完了，甚至还觉得不够！总体来说十分值得一看，我心里在番茄目前的Top。","text_exts":[{"e":215,"s":212,"text":"故事会","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739780704ED93454%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227357944669459497752%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227229209420364778554%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713157729,"group_id":"7229209420364778554","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N76M2U10VBx938cvtkDUnuhpzFBLbb95teii015IzRhP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/81b752b650ca421b888be1fa48f6001b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530730&x-signature=aiZ6r3ELKL%2BiDWPJmLPGjGAklXs%3D","user_id":"1841052103218906","user_name":"红尘亿沙雕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1841052103218906","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229209420364778554","book_info":{"abstract":"【无cp+无敌+苟】唐诗穿越异世修仙界，根骨不佳，卷也卷不赢，摆也摆不烂，累了毁灭吧，运气好的话明天就亖了捏。
